messages: We recommend that you install the CMake Tools extension to enable CMake build and test tools.
Do you want to build the CMake project with the CMake Tools extension?
Do you want to build targets [{0}] with the CMake Tools extension?
Do you want to build the targets [{0}], and more with the CMake Tools extension?
List build targets with the CMake Tools extension
List tests with the CMake Tools extension
Do you want to run tests with the CMake Tools extension?
Test with the CMake Tools extension

The C++ DevTools extension may be used only with Microsoft Visual Studio Code, vscode.dev, GitHub Codespaces from GitHub, Inc., and successor Microsoft, GitHub, and other Microsoft affiliates' products and services
